[StartBattle] Gain Atk Weight +1 for every 3 [RegainedStrength] on self (max 2)
[EndSkill] Consume 3 [RegainedStrength]
skills.name: Hardblood Wedge

skills.desc: [WhenUse] Consume up to 40 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [RegainedStrength] for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
skills.name: Desire for Blood

skills.desc:
[CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] Consume up to 300 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [RegainedStrength] and heal 3 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] If this unit consumed [BloodDinner], heal 30 SP
skills.name: Moment of Bloodfeast

skills.desc:
Cannot be Staggered until he uses this Skill.
[WhenUse] Consume up to 100 [BloodDinner]: gain 1 [RegainedStrength] and heal 15 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every [BloodDinner_Accumulation] by this unit (max 15)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% damage, and the damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target.
[EndSkill] For this turn and next turn, gain [AttackDown] and [DefenseDown] equal to the Clash Power gained with this Skill. (max 15)
skills.name: Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 4 - Sundering

skills.desc:
[DuelGuard]
[WinDuel] Inflict 4 [Laceration] and [Burst]
[DefeatDuel] Consume 2 [RegainedStrength]
skills.name: Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 14: Mantle

skills.desc:
[DuelCounter]
Base Power +1 for every 10 [RegainedStrength]
Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Laceration] on the target (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Lose 3 SP
skills.name: Frail, So Frail

skills.desc:
[CantDuel]
[WhenUse] Generate Coagulated Dream next turn
skills.name: Bloody-Merry-Go-Round

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] The target becomes staggered, then becomes [Penetration] next turn
[EndCoin] The target loses 25 [Laceration] Potency. Gain [Laceration] and increase [BloodDinner] equal to that value

skills.desc: [DefeatDuel] Lose 3 SP
skills.name: Be Impaled

skills.desc:
Cannot be Staggered until he uses this Skill.
Deal more damage equal to [BloodDinner_Common_Accumulation]. (max 300%)
[WhenUse] Heal 30 SP
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 10 [RegainedStrength]
[EndSkill] Consume all [RegainedStrength]. Gain 5 [Vulnerable] this turn and next turn. Gain 2 [Binding] next turn.
skills.name: Ascendant Don Quixote Hardblood Arts - The Sphere
Ascendant Don Quixote Hardblood Arts - La Sangre

passives.desc:
If this unit is eliminated, increase [BloodDinner] by 30
When killed by a Sinner, generate Memories of the Dreaming Adventure
passives.name: Broken Fragment of a Futile, Naive Dream

passives.desc:
When killed by Don Quixote:
- Don Quixote gains 5 [RegainedStrength].
- All Sinners take 30 Lust damage and gain 8 [Laceration] Potency and Count.
passives.name: A Selfish Wish at the Expense of the Family

passives.desc: If this unit has [Precarious], Memories of the Dreaming Adventure will not be generated on death
passives.name: I never should've dreamed this irresponsible dream

passives.desc: Don Quixote gains Shield at every Turn Start.
passives.name: The adventure ends here.

passives.desc: When this unit is eliminated, the ally who was impaled by this unit will lose the [Penetration] status next turn.
passives.name: Hardblood Wedge Gaol

passives.desc: When this unit is eliminated, gain 3 E.G.O resources for the least-owned E.G.O resource.
passives.name: Shattering, Scattering Hardblood

passives.desc:
If this unit is not eliminated by the turn after its generation, this unit will be eliminated at Turn End, activating the following effect.
The ally who was impaled by this unit takes fixed damage equal to 30% of their max HP, and gains 10 [Laceration] Potency and +5 [Laceration] Count.
passives.name: Internal Blood Crystallization

passives.desc: When killed by true Don Quixote, activate the on-death effect, and the ally impaled by this unit will be killed.
passives.name: Total Blood Coagulation

passives.desc:
All Sinners gain 5 SP at every Turn Start.
Don Quixote the Sinner gains a special effect
passives.name: Memories of the Journeys Past

passives.desc: When killed by Don Quixote: Don Quixote gains 3 [Reduction] this turn and next turn.
passives.name: Reminders of Determination

skills.desc:
[StartBattle] Apply 1 [ParryingResultUp] and 1 [AttackDmgUp] to a random Sinner
[StartBattle] Inflict 1 [Vulnerable] against both Don Quixote and his Coagulated Dream
skills.name: Shining Memories of the Adventure
